name: implementation-review-loop
description: Runs a focused implementation worker, manager review, and looped pickup resolution with compact worker prompts.

input.implementationPrompt: Implement the design document as a focused code change. Keep the work scoped and commit-ready.

steps.name: ensure-review-loop-task
steps.description: Ensure this implementation review loop has a Flight Deck task in progress before worker iterations start.

steps.name: implementation-worker
steps.description: Starts a focused coding worker session to implement the design or resolve manager pickups.
steps.prompt:
You are the implementation worker in a Wingmen implementation-review pipeline.

Inputs:
- createdTask/taskId identify the Flight Deck task for this loop.
- designDocumentUrl points to the design. Read it directly; do not paste document text into JSON.
- implementationPrompt is the starting goal for iteration 1.
- On later iterations, nextWorkerPrompt and managerPickups are the focused worklist. Treat them as authoritative.
- relevantContext is optional background only.

Work rules:
- Inspect the current git status before editing.
- Preserve existing work and unrelated dirty files.
- Make only scoped changes needed for the current worklist.
- If a pickup names another repo, inspect or edit that repo only as needed and report paths with a repo prefix.
- Run targeted validation, then broader validation when practical.
- Do not update Flight Deck task state, post task comments, or reply to chat. Deterministic pipeline steps publish progress and closeout.

Callback result object:
{
  "workerSummary": "short summary of work performed",
  "designDocumentUrl": "same reference",
  "workingDirectory": "repo path",
  "iteration": 1,
  "changedFiles": ["repo/path.ext"],
  "commandsRun": [{"command":"...", "status":"passed|failed|not_run", "notes":"..."}],
  "git": {"branch":"", "status":"", "commits":[], "prUrl":""},
  "resolvedPickups": [{"title":"", "notes":""}],
  "openQuestions": [],
  "handoffNotes": "specific points for manager review"
}

Return compact structured metadata only. Code changes stay in the repository.

steps.name: managerial-review
steps.description: Reviews design, current repository state, worker output, git diff/commits, and decides whether implementation is done.
steps.prompt:
You are the managerial reviewer in a Wingmen implementation-review pipeline.

Review scope:
- Read designDocumentUrl and implementationPrompt.
- Inspect current repository state, git status, relevant diff, tests, and worker handoff.
- Judge whether the design is implemented well enough to close out.
- Be strict about incomplete behavior, missing tests, unsafe changes, and unclear handoff.

Output contract:
- Return a JSON object.
- Set done true only when no important pickups remain.
- If done is false, produce a compact nextWorkerPrompt with only the next actionable worklist.
- Do not repeat full history, full file contents, or full design text.
- Do not update Flight Deck task state, post task comments, or reply to chat. The next deterministic step publishes your manager progress comment.

Callback result object:
{
  "done": false,
  "managerSummary": "short review summary",
  "completed": ["what is complete"],
  "pickups": [{"title":"", "priority":"high|medium|low", "reason":"", "action":"", "files":[""]}],
  "risks": [],
  "validationFindings": [{"command":"...", "status":"passed|failed|not_run", "notes":"..."}],
  "gitReview": {"branch":"", "status":"", "commits":[], "prUrl":""},
  "nextWorkerPrompt": "Only the specific next actions for the next worker. Leave empty when done is true."
}

steps.name: normalise-manager-review
steps.description: Normalises manager review JSON so done is a real boolean before loop evaluation.

steps.name: comment-manager-progress
steps.description: Post the current manager review result to the Flight Deck task before any next worker iteration.

steps.name: loop-to-implementation-worker
steps.description: If the manager is not satisfied, capture this pass and start a fresh worker session, up to maxReviewIterations.

steps.name: final-implementation-report
steps.description: Produces the final report for the user after manager approval or max loop exhaustion.
steps.prompt:
You are closing out a Wingmen implementation-review pipeline.

Create a concise final implementation report from the worker outputs, manager reviews, git status, and current repository state. Do not run Flight Deck/Yoke commands, update task state, post task comments, or reply to chat. The next deterministic pipeline step will move the task to review and report back to chat.

Callback result object:
{
  "done": true,
  "status": "complete|incomplete|max_iterations_reached",
  "summary": "what was implemented and reviewed",
  "taskUpdateComment": "short final task comment body for the deterministic closeout step",
  "designDocumentUrl": "",
  "workingDirectory": "",
  "git": {"branch":"", "status":"", "commits":[], "prUrl":""},
  "validation": [{"command":"...", "status":"passed|failed|not_run", "notes":"..."}],
  "remainingPickups": [],
  "reviewIterations": 1,
  "postedReport": {"attempted": false, "target":"deterministic-closeout", "notes":"reporting is handled by dispatch.markTaskReadyForReview"},
  "nextActions": []
}

Set status to complete only if managerReview.done is true. If maxReviewIterations was reached and managerReview.done is not true, set status to max_iterations_reached and include remaining pickups.

steps.name: close-review-task
steps.description: Move the Flight Deck task to review, post the final task comment, and notify the original chat thread or configured channel.
